query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, COLUMN_KEY, EXTRA FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'shopify_accounts' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, COLUMN_KEY, EXTRA FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'shopify_accounts' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT	COLUMN_KEY	EXTRA
id	int	NO	NULL	PRI	auto_increment
user_id	int	NO	NULL	UNI	
shop_domain	varchar	NO	NULL		
access_token	text	NO	NULL		
scope	varchar	YES	NULL		
shop_name	varchar	YES	NULL		
shop_email	varchar	YES	NULL		
currency	varchar	YES	EUR		
connected_at	timestamp	NO	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP		
updated_at	timestamp	NO	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP		DEFAULT_GENERATED on update CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
